title: connection.accepted
description: Published by Connection Service when a recipient accepts a connection request. Consumed by Chat Service (open room) and Notification Service (alert both users).
_comment_event_driven: This event triggers two independent downstream reactions — Chat Service and Notification Service both subscribe. Neither subscriber is aware of the other. This is fan-out via event-driven architecture.
_comment_outbox: Connection Service writes this event to its outbox table in the same transaction that flips connection status to ACCEPTED. Atomicity ensures the DB and Kafka never diverge.

connection_id.description: The connection request that was accepted.

requester_id.description: User who sent the connection request.

recipient_id.description: User who accepted the connection request.
